tiktok.caption: Prices went up AND packages got smaller. Shrinkflation is stealing $2,900 from your groceries every year — and you never noticed.

youtube_short.title: Shrinkflation Is Stealing $2,900 From You
title_alternatives: Your Groceries Are Getting Smaller — And You're Paying More
The Hidden $2,900 Grocery Scam Nobody Talks About
youtube_short.description: Your grocery bill keeps climbing but your bags keep getting lighter. Since 2020, food companies shrank their products 15% while prices jumped 26% — a real effective price hike of 49%. The average household is handing over $2,900 extra every year for less food than they got five years ago. The fix? Always check price per ounce, not price per package. That one habit alone puts $2,900 back in your pocket. Follow for more hidden money traps. #shrinkflation #personalfinance #grocerytips #savemoney #moneytrap

hook_line: Your groceries are shrinking. Your bill isn't.
